step_rationale: Identified as ACS biomarker; mechanism in MI/ACS not yet mechanistically mapped to atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: HECW2 is elevated in acute coronary syndrome but its specific role in atherothrombotic pathophysiology remains to be defined.

references.title: Novel Biomarker Identification for Acute Coronary Syndrome via Integrating WGCNA and Machine Learning.
